sourcePrompt: An Indochinese tiger caught mid-stalk, about two and a half meters nose to tail-tip. A big cat pressed low and forward, shoulders rolling above a dipped spine, head level and fixed ahead, the long tail trailing in a shallow curve, all four paws planted wide and silent. A broad white-cheeked face, and the classic coat: burnt orange banded with black stripes. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
